positive: A minimalist line-art illustration of a majestic mountain range at sunrise. The scene features simplified geometric representations of peaks and deep valleys, rendered in a continuous, elegant line-art style. The composition is highly symmetrical, placing the largest central mountain peak. Focus on strong contrast between the dark, clean black lines and a subtle, warm gradient background of soft ochre and pale lavender. Include subtle negative space elements like stylized wisps of smoke or celestial bodies. Ideal for a clean, single-color screen-print effect. Flat vector aesthetic, perfect for apparel printing, high contrast, detailed silhouette, clean linework.
